critical_questions.question: Any prior distinct neurological episodes (e.g. optic neuritis, sensory changes, weakness) consistent with a previous demyelinating event?
Any new bladder or bowel symptoms (urgency, retention, incontinence)?
Are symptoms progressive, or did they evolve over hours-to-days consistent with a relapse pattern?
Does the patient have a known MS diagnosis, and if so, what disease-modifying therapy are they on?
